title: Easy remelting of ores
description: Easy remelting of ore is your mod if you want to melt ore blocks into metal blocks
body:
The opportunity to melt ore blocks will now please you, because having collected full pockets of ore, you want  to put it together and put it immediately into the furnace without disassembling!
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d08cca66bd76b958cfd5482493a6bd50cffb8d72.jpeg)
